title: What a Blonde
actors: Leon Errol, Richard Lane, Michael St. Angel
plot: Lingerie tycoon F. Farrington Fowler is in a spot as he has ran out of gas-ration coupons. He enlists his butler, Pomeroy, to drum up riders so that he can get extra coupons from the ration board. Pomeroy gets a bunch of showgirls...
